positioning.headline: AI Agent / Harness Engineering
positioning.summary: Practical agent tooling focused on replayable workflows, inspectable artifacts, and operator-facing quality gates.

active_products.value: TypeScript and Rust runtime for embedding providers, skills, MCP, and fast local tools into existing systems.
Long-audio transcription and meeting-notes harness with chunking, structured outputs, and exportable artifacts.
local_quickstart: agent-meeting-notes run path/to/meeting.mp3 --out runs/meeting-001 --transcriber openai --summarizer openai
artifact_examples: transcript.md with timestamps and speaker-attributed segments
summary.md with decisions, action items, and risks
notes.json with structured metadata for downstream review

active_products.value: Human-reviewed content pipeline for Xiaohongshu and RedNote drafts, calendars, and publish packages.
artifact_examples: note.json draft package with title, body, hashtags, and metadata
calendar.csv or markdown planning output for reviewable scheduling
diagnostic JSON from inspect and check commands for operator signoff

active_products.value: Personal site and long-term public surface for demos, notes, and portfolio framing.

shipped_workflow_slices.current_surface: agent-meeting-notes run, probe, estimate, inspect, check
shipped_workflow_slices.why_it_matters: Turns a multi-hour recording into reusable transcript and summary artifacts with preflight and quality gates.

shipped_workflow_slices.current_surface: xhs-content-agent draft, calendar, titles, inspect, check
shipped_workflow_slices.why_it_matters: Treats creator work as a reviewable pipeline instead of one-shot prompting or unsafe automation.
Pushes toward a reusable execution layer where models, tools, and traces can be composed inside real systems.

supporting_repositories.why: Early CLI experiments around chat APIs and terminal interaction patterns.
Linux kernel lab work and low-level systems exposure.

next_build_targets: compact agent harness lab with repeatable tasks and pass/fail checks
stronger trace and evaluation surfaces around tool use
more examples that show how CLI products fit into actual operator workflows
